title: DB files not removed if all rows are deleted, even after restart
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
CREATE TABLE empty_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table LIMIT 0;
key_bug_features: DB files persist after deleting all rows
